query:
SELECT 
  pc.cityName,
  pc.partnerBankName,
  pc.partnerBankAccount,
  pc.partnerAccountHolder,
  p.accountName,
  p.bankName,
  p.accountNumber
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
WHERE pc.cityName = '宁波';
